/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/test/mocks/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/lib/func/functions.cpp.o  -o run_tests  lib/addOn/libaddon_lib.a lib/func/libaddon_func_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmock.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmock_main.a -lpthread
